purpose: Route incoming context and files by extension or type into canonical queues for LightSpeed to Raphael launch work.

queues.action: register metadata, assign brand role, place durable binary when available
extract sections and route into templates tasks maps or registers
inspect tabs, classify dashboard type, collapse versions, preserve logs
inventory, inspect, compare, and classify canonical candidate or archive copy

queues.target: web route dashboards and proof packets
queues.action: validate route state, claim gate, component map and publish readiness
compile or test where possible and record source boundary
route to Investor dashboard rather than Operations by default
assign to Achilles Neo Library Route Workbook Archive Investor or future Z operator lane

rule: Preserve source truth and route extracted content into the correct queue before any cleanup decision.
nextActions: Populate each queue from current Drive Git and file lists
Fold queue status into OPEN_TASKS or task deltas
